HPACK decoder

Imports

huffman_decoder, headers_data, hcollections, exceptions

Types

DecodedSlice = object
  n*: Slice[int]
  v*: Slice[int]
A decoded string slice. It has the boundaries of header's name and value 
DecodedStr = object
  s*: string
  b*: seq[int]
A decoded string contains a string of all headers name/value put together and a sequence of their boundaries 
DecodeError = object of HpackError

Procs

proc `$`(d: DecodedStr): string {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Use it for debugging purposes only 
proc `[]`(d: DecodedStr; i: BackwardsIndex): DecodedSlice {.inline, ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Return the header slice of a decoded string at position i 
proc `[]`(d: DecodedStr; i: int): DecodedSlice {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Return the header slice of a decoded string at position i 
proc add(d: var DecodedStr; s: string) {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Add either a header name or a value.
var ds = initDecodedStr()
ds.add("my-header")
ds.add("my-value")
proc clear(d: var DecodedStr) {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Efficiently clear a decoded string 
proc hdecode(s: openArray[byte]; h: var DynHeaders; d: var DecodedStr): Natural {.
    ...deprecated, raises: [DynHeadersError, DecodeError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Deprecated
Deprecated, use hdecode(openArray[byte], var DynHeaders, var DecodedStr, var int) instead 
proc hdecode(s: openArray[byte]; h: var DynHeaders; d: var DecodedStr;
             dhSize: var int): Natural {....raises: [DecodeError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Decode a single header. Return number of consumed octets. s bytes sequence must not be empty. dhSize will contain the dynamic table size update or -1 otherwise 
proc hdecodeAll(s: openArray[byte]; h: var DynHeaders; d: var DecodedStr) {.
    ...raises: [DynHeadersError, DecodeError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Decode all headers from the blob of bytes s and stores it into a decoded stringd. The dynamic headers are stored into h to decode the next message. 
proc hdecodeAll(s: openArray[byte]; h: var DynHeaders; d: var DecodedStr;
                dhSize: var int) {....deprecated,
                                   raises: [DynHeadersError, DecodeError],
                                   tags: [], forbids: [].}
Deprecated 
proc initDecodedStr(): DecodedStr {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Initialize a DecodedStr 
proc len(d: DecodedStr): int {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Return the lenght of a DecodedStr 
proc reset(d: var DecodedStr) {....deprecated, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Deprecated
Deprecated, use clear() instead

Iterators

iterator items(d: DecodedStr): DecodedSlice {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Iterate over headers name and value
var
  i = 0
  ds = initDecodedStr()
ds.add("my-header")
ds.add("my-value")
for h in ds:
  assert ds.s[h.n] == "my-header"
  assert ds.s[h.v] == "my-value"
  inc i
assert i == 1

Exports

DynHeaders, HpackError, HBounds, clearLastResize, clear, len, setSize, add, minSetSize, items, initHBounds, initDynHeaders, reset, hasResized, finalSetSize, substr, cmp, $, DynHeadersError, pairs, [], HpackError
